label: Dataset ID
description: Dataset specification identifier
missing_rule: Always populated from the dataset specification

label: Dataset name
description: Dataset specification name
missing_rule: Always populated from the dataset specification

label: Participant ID
description: Study-specific participant identifier
missing_rule: Should uniquely identify a participant within a dataset

label: Wave
description: Study wave or collection occasion
missing_rule: Use NA when no repeated-wave structure is available

label: Age in years
description: Participant age at the observation in years
missing_rule: Use NA when age cannot yet be derived

label: Sex
description: Harmonised participant sex/gender field
missing_rule: Use Unknown if cannot be derived
notes: Use explicit lookup tables when recoding source categories

label: Country
description: Participant's location at observation point
missing_rule: Use Unknown if cannot be derived
notes: If not in dataset, assume based on where data were collected

label: Ethnicity
description: Participant ethnicity
missing_rule: Use Unknown if cannot be derived

label: Minority
description: Indicator for if the participant ethnicity indicates they are a minority within their country/region
missing_rule: Use Unknown if cannot be derived

label: Area-level SES
description: Socioeconomic status for the area the participant lives
missing_rule: Use Unknown if cannot be derived
notes: Where feasible, based on quintiles, where top 2 and bottom 2 are high and low.

label: Screen Time Measurement Type
description: Type of measure used for screen time
missing_rule: Should not be missing
notes: Record the type of variable the original study used to capture screen time

label: Screen Time Measure Name
description: Name for screen time measure, if known or provided
missing_rule: Should not be missing - using 'Unknown' or 'Custom' as required

label: Screen Time: Watching (e.g., TV, streaming) on average weekday
description: Time spent watching content (e.g., TV, movies, streaming) on weekdays
missing_rule: Use NA if not available

label: Screen Time: Watching (e.g., TV, streaming) on average weekend day
description: Time spent watching content (e.g., TV, movies, streaming) on weekends
missing_rule: Use NA if not available

label: Screen Time: Gaming (computer or console) on average weekday
description: Time spent playing games (e.g., console or computer games) on weekdays
missing_rule: Use NA if not available

label: Screen Time: Gaming (computer or console) on average weekend day
description: Time spent playing games (e.g., console or computer games) on weekends
missing_rule: Use NA if not available

label: Screen Time: Computer (non-gaming) on average weekday
description: Time spent using a computer (non-gaming) on weekdays
missing_rule: Use NA if not available

label: Screen Time: Computer (non-gaming) on average weekend day
description: Time spent using a computer (non-gaming) on weekends
missing_rule: Use NA if not available

label: Screen Time: Smartphone (e.g., social media) on average weekday
description: Time spent using a smartphone (e.g., social media) on weekdays
missing_rule: Use NA if not available

label: Screen Time: Smartphone (e.g., social media) on average weekend day
description: Time spent using a smartphone (e.g., social media) on weekends
missing_rule: Use NA if not available

label: Wellbeing: Mental Wellbeing - Warwick Edinburgh Mental Wellbeing Scale
description: Raw summed score on WEMWBS
missing_rule: Use NA if not available
notes: Initial variable - likely to be revised
